See PROXY_OPTIONS for more.","errors":{"AddressEmptyCode(address)":[{"details":"There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract)."}],"ERC1967InvalidImplementation(address)":[{"details":"The `implementation` of the proxy is invalid."}],"ERC1967NonPayable()":[{"details":"An upgrade function sees `msg.value > 0` that may be lost."}],"FailedCall()":[{"details":"A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted."}],"InvalidInitialization()":[{"details":"The contract is already initialized."}],"NotInitializing()":[{"details":"The contract is not initializing."}],"RequestKeyConflict(bool,uint40,uint40,bytes16,bytes16)":[{"details":"Occurs during a request where (`reqId` is reused and/or `seqNum` < expected) and the prior call had a different key (caller,seqNum,reqId) so replay does not occur as it otherwise could","params":{"isNewReqId":"true: `reqIdAct` is new; false: value was reused with a different (caller,seqNum)","reqIdAct":"Actual request id received","reqIdExp":"Expected request id, based upon cache lookup by (caller,seqNum); Zero-value if !`isNewReqId`","seqNumAct":"Actual sequence number received","seqNumExp":"Expected sequence number based upon caller"}}],"SeqNumGap(uint40,uint40,address)":[{"details":"Occurs when seq num `rcvd` > `expect`, possible causes: error from network/provider/client/reorg     - Invariant: `seqNum` must increment monotonically for a write call, see table above","params":{"caller":"Caller's address","seqNumAct":"Received sequence number","seqNumExp":"Expected sequence number"}}],"UUPSUnauthorizedCallContext()":[{"details":"The call is from an unauthorized context."}],"UUPSUnsupportedProxiableUUID(bytes32)":[{"details":"The storage `slot` is unsupported as a UUID."}]},"events":{"Initialized(uint64)":{"details":"Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized."},"ReqAck(bytes16,address,uint40,(bytes16,uint16,uint16,uint16,uint40,uint40),bool)":{"details":"A Request Acknowledgement Event occurs at the end of each request (if no revert) and bridges the gaps between data sources, clients, lossy/unreliable protocols/providers/neworks, and the on-chain call outcome - Captures 3 categories of data for off-chain calls:     - Key inputs (indexed params) allow a tx search via either:         - PK1: reqId: Allows a tx search on a single field such as to fill a gap on replay         - PK2: (caller,seqNum): Allows a tx search to audit a sequence for a caller     - Context: `replay` and `callRes.blockNum` provide context on when/where this happened     - Output: `callRes` provides fields (rc, lrc, count) for either a simple result or summary         - Additional results can be found in the tx receipt logs from prior events in the same tx","params":{"callRes":"See `CallRes`; `reqId` and `ReqAck` are separate params for indexes","caller":"Account initiating the tx","replay":"false for an original event, true when `reqId` was already processed","reqId":"From CallRes: Request ID, allows for gap-fill on replay","seqNum":"From CallRes: Caller's sequence number incremented monotonically"}},"Upgraded(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the implementation is upgraded."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"custom:api":"private","details":"Ensures the logic contract cannot be hijacked before the `initializer` runs - Sets version to `type(uint64).max` + `emit Initialized(version)` to prevent future initialization - `initialize` is where the business logic is initialized on proxies - For more info see comments in 'Initializable.sol'"},"getCallResByReqId(bytes16)":{"custom:api":"public","details":"Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case","params":{"reqId":"Request ID of a prior call"},"returns":{"cr":"See `CallRes`"}},"getCallResBySeqNum(uint40)":{"custom:api":"public","details":"Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case","params":{"seqNum":"Sequence number of a prior call by this caller"},"returns":{"cr":"See `CallRes`"}},"getContract(uint8)":{"details":"Get a contract address","params":{"contractId":"Contract ID requested"},"returns":{"_0":"Requested contract address"}},"getOwnInfo(uint256,string,uint256,bytes16)":{"details":"Get owner information (qty, revenue) for an instrument and earn date - To enumerate instrument or earn dates, or one within the other, see `EarnDateMgr`","params":{"earnDate":"Earn date, 0 not allowed","instName":"Instrument name, empty is not allowed","ownerEid":"Owner's external id","pid":"Proposal ID, >0 to query a proposal, =0 to query executed state"},"returns":{"qty":"units owned","revenue":"(units owned) x (unit price) for the inputs"}},"getOwnInfos(uint256,string,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Get owner information (eid, qty, revenue) for an instrument and earn date - To enumerate instrument or earn dates, or one within the other, see `EarnDateMgr` - Caller must page outputs to avoid gas issues, see PAGE_REQUESTS","params":{"count":"Items to get, 0 = [iBegin:] (may exceed gas), See `getOwnInfosLen(instName, earnDate)`","earnDate":"Earn date, 0 not allowed","iBegin":"Index in the array to begin processing","instName":"Instrument name, empty is not allowed","pid":"Proposal ID, >0 to query a proposal, =0 to query executed state"},"returns":{"ownInfos":"requested range of items"}},"getOwnInfosLen(uint256,string,uint256)":{"details":"Get count of owner information for an instrument and earn date - To enumerate instrument or earn dates, or one within the other, see `EarnDateMgr`","params":{"earnDate":"Earn date, 0 not allowed","instName":"Instrument name, empty not allowed","pid":"Proposal ID, >0 to query a proposal, =0 to query executed state"},"returns":{"executedAt":"When owners allocation completed, =0 if not complete","len":"Number of owners","uploadedAt":"When owners upload completed, =0 if not complete"}},"getPropHdr(uint256)":{"params":{"pid":"Proposal ID, identifies an existing proposal"}},"getSeqNum(address)":{"details":"Get next expected seq num for the given account address","params":{"account":"Address to lookup"},"returns":{"seqNumEx":"Next expected seq num to be passed to a write function call from `account`"}},"getVersion()":{"details":"Get the current version"},"initialize(address,bytes16)":{"custom:api":"protected","details":"Basically replaces the constructor in a proxy oriented contract - `initializer` modifier ensures this function can only be called once during deploy - See UUPS_UPGRADE_SEQ for details on how to upgrade this contract","params":{"creator":"Creator's address for access control during setup","reqId":"Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers"}},"preUpgrade(uint40,bytes16,bytes16)":{"details":"Stage values to use in the next call to `__authorizeUpgrade`","params":{"reqId":"Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers","reqIdStage":"Param to stage","seqNumEx":"=0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`"}},"propAddOwners(uint40,bytes16,(uint256,uint256,uint256,string,uint256,(uint256,uint64,bytes16)[]))":{"custom:api":"public","details":"Idempotency is provided via correct client processing of function i/o - Naming uses a metaphor where each upload has a page of lines (OwnInfo[]) added to a book of lines - CallRes: Indicates progress where `rc` is set from `AddOwnRc`","params":{"req":"See struct definition - reduces stack pressure","reqId":"Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers","seqNumEx":"=0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`"}},"propCreate(uint256,bytes16,address,bool)":{"custom:api":"private","details":"Add an instrument revenue proposal, this creates a stub that must be populated by additional calls - Inputs validated upstream - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain","params":{"ccyAddr":"Revenue currency address","correction":"Whether the proposal is a correction","pid":"Proposal ID, always increases","reqId":"Request ID"}},"propExecute(uint256)":{"custom:api":"private","details":"Execute an instrument revenue proposal as gas allows, progress given by return code - This function should be called until `code=ExecRevRc.Done`, work is unlikely to complete in a single tx - Idempotency is provided by an private cursor. Excess calls are safe and only waste gas. - All values in the proposal validated upstream: before on-chain, during upload/creation, and during approval - Instruments processing is sequential. Consider `pruneProposal` in the unlikely event of blocked progress. - See REV_MGR_PROP_EXEC_BIG_O for pros/cons on this algo being O(N^2) vs O(N) - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain","params":{"pid":"Proposal ID"},"returns":{"result":"Indicates progress where `rc` is set from `ExecRevRc` - Progress: Partial progress - Done    : Proposal is complete - NoProp  : No proposal found by pid - PartProp: Partial proposal found, not fully uploaded - PropStat: Proposal status not fit for execution - LowFunds: An event should provide more context, such as: LowFunds, LowAllowance, XferErr - NoOwners: No owners found for instrument revenue - NoInstRev: Should not happen, would indicate a corrupt interaction with the InstRevMgr"}},"propFinalize(uint256)":{"custom:api":"private","details":"Reviews progress of `propAddInstRev` and `propAddOwners` and marks request as fully uploaded - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain","params":{"pid":"Proposal ID"},"returns":{"rc":"Indicates progress: - Ok        : Proposal upload complete - NoProp    : No proposal found by pid - DiffLens  : Different count of instrument revenues and owner snapshots - NoInstRev : No instrument revenue in proposal - PartOwners: Owners are only partially uploaded"}},"proxiableUUID()":{"details":"Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"pruneProp(uint256,string,uint256)":{"custom:api":"private","details":"Remove an instrument earn date (InstRev + OwnSnap) from a sealed proposal - This is an escape hatch to help ensure progress in `propExecute` - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain","params":{"earnDate":"Instrument's earn date","instName":"Instrument name","pid":"Proposal ID"},"returns":{"rc":"Indicates progress: - Done     : Proposal is complete - NoProp   : No proposal found by pid - PropStat : Proposal is not fully uploaded, create a new proposal - NoInst   : Not found in proposal by key - LastInst : Pruning the last instrument would invalidate the proposal - MidBal   : Proposal is in the middle of balance increases, see `rc` below (Should not happen) - LastInst : Pruning the last instrument would invalidate the proposal"}},"setContract(uint40,bytes16,uint8,address)":{"custom:api":"public","details":"Less size than separate setters","params":{"contractId":"Identifies the contract being set","newProxy":"The new proxy address","reqId":"Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers","seqNumEx":"=0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`"}},"upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes)":{"custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow-reachable":"delegatecall","details":"Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event."}},"title":"RevMgr: Revenue manager for history, allocations, and claims","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"getPropHdr(uint256)":{"notice":"Get instrument revenue proposal header info. - To get `InstRev` in the prop, see `getInstRevs` - To get `OwnInfo` in the prop, see `getOwnInfo`"},"propAddOwners(uint40,bytes16,(uint256,uint256,uint256,string,uint256,(uint256,uint64,bytes16)[]))":{"notice":"Add to the ownership snapshot for an instrument earn date - Must occur after `propAddInstRev` since it stores revenue per owner in each OwnInfo to simplify the model   and that requires InstRev for validation"},"setContract(uint40,bytes16,uint8,address)":{"notice":"Set a ","urls":["bzz-raw://a6f86fd01f829499fe0545ff5dda07d4521988e88bfe0bf801fc15650921ed56","dweb:/ipfs/QmUUKu4ZDffHAmfkf3asuQfmLTyfpuy2Amdncc3SqfzKPG"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Panic.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf7fe324703a64fc51702311dc51562d5cb1497734f074e4f483bfb6717572d7a","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c6a5ff4f9fd8649b7ee20800b7fa387d3465bd77cf20c2d1068cd5c98e1ed57a","dweb:/ipfs/QmVSaVJf9FXFhdYEYeCEfjMVHrxDh5qL4CGkxdMWpQCrqG"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/StorageSlot.sol":{"keccak256":"0xcf74f855663ce2ae00ed8352666b7935f6cddea2932fdf2c3ecd30a9b1cd0e97","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9f660b1f351b757dfe01438e59888f31f33ded3afcf5cb5b0d9bf9aa6f320a8b","dweb:/ipfs/QmarDJ5hZEgBtCmmrVzEZWjub9769eD686jmzb2XpSU1cM"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/Strings.sol":{"keccak256":"0x36d1750bf1aa5fee9c52adb2f7857ab652daca722fc05dff533b364f67a1139a","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://2e5e7052539b7849d02f3ce25acc1dce29373c11cfae9f0bc918c54b780c549a","dweb:/ipfs/QmRGE32xNkMTo6i4pHHMxjpiu77yPwnTA25SFngw2NXJys"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/cryptography/ECDSA.sol":{"keccak256":"0x360cf86214a764694dae1522a38200b1737fe90e46dcf56a0f89de143071cc20","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://2e393290a46ca6d1fa1addb40709d26e1d250638ab6acdd103b5af21768ebc7b","dweb:/ipfs/QmPwT3tXwQ9NbGtZ99XRq7sr8LCQP8XaCrzw49JdXGn7us"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/cryptography/MessageHashUtils.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6abeed5940e1da7bb329e458db9a1c5c4ea6f86d651b952af99c6bddcd6bbb94","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5fe75e9a6b759c5d7fd82fb59bd4f58c672b36f0a69b84f4789b7c7895d3e61c","dweb:/ipfs/QmX28wsir8w5sS3acfJMNHcBwoPsDpqCu7WDkPnUWLMNiZ"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8891738ffe910f0cf2da09566928589bf5d63f4524dd734fd9cedbac3274dd5c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://971f954442df5c2ef5b5ebf1eb245d7105d9fbacc7386ee5c796df1d45b21617","dweb:/ipfs/QmadRjHbkicwqwwh61raUEapaVEtaLMcYbQZWs9gUkgj3u"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol":{"keccak256":"0x09e3f1c72d4c5cbe8e2644ab7313f8f7177533ae2f4c24cdcbbeaf520a73734c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://93208401215d539fa2d81626b207c1f611def7883d0e447b3b5969ebaa7b3c2c","dweb:/ipfs/QmXPxDnQPx8LAweX5ZJqEcwkvs59kP4c64VVDG1Jjq1mef"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/SafeCast.sol":{"keccak256":"0x195533c86d0ef72bcc06456a4f66a9b941f38eb403739b00f21fd7c1abd1ae54","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://b1d578337048cad08c1c03041cca5978eff5428aa130c781b271ad9e5566e1f8","dweb:/ipfs/QmPFKL2r9CBsMwmUqqdcFPfHZB2qcs9g1HDrPxzWSxomvy"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/SignedMath.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb1970fac7b64e6c09611e6691791e848d5e3fe410fa5899e7df2e0afd77a99e3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://db5fbb3dddd8b7047465b62575d96231ba8a2774d37fb4737fbf23340fabbb03","dweb:/ipfs/QmVUSvooZKEdEdap619tcJjTLcAuH6QBdZqAzWwnAXZAWJ"]}},"version":1}

constructor.details: Ensures the logic contract cannot be hijacked before the `initializer` runs - Sets version to `type(uint64).max` + `emit Initialized(version)` to prevent future initialization - `initialize` is where the business logic is initialized on proxies - For more info see comments in 'Initializable.sol'

getCallResByReqId(bytes16).details: Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case

params.reqId: Request ID of a prior call

getCallResBySeqNum(uint40).details: Get a result for a prior write function call invoked from off-chain by this caller - Subject to storage lag when retrieved off-chain shortly after write, prefer the `ReqAck` event in that case

params.seqNum: Sequence number of a prior call by this caller

getOwnInfo(uint256,string,uint256,bytes1.details: Get owner information (qty, revenue) for an instrument and earn date - To enumerate instrument or earn dates, or one within the other, see `EarnDateMgr`

params.instName: Instrument name, empty is not allowed
params.pid: Proposal ID, >0 to query a proposal, =0 to query executed state

returns.revenue: (units owned) x (unit price) for the inputs

getOwnInfos(uint256,string,uint256,uint2.details: Get owner information (eid, qty, revenue) for an instrument and earn date - To enumerate instrument or earn dates, or one within the other, see `EarnDateMgr` - Caller must page outputs to avoid gas issues, see PAGE_REQUESTS

params.count: Items to get, 0 = [iBegin:] (may exceed gas), See `getOwnInfosLen(instName, earnDate)`
params.iBegin: Index in the array to begin processing
params.instName: Instrument name, empty is not allowed
params.pid: Proposal ID, >0 to query a proposal, =0 to query executed state

getOwnInfosLen(uint256,string,uint256).details: Get count of owner information for an instrument and earn date - To enumerate instrument or earn dates, or one within the other, see `EarnDateMgr`

params.pid: Proposal ID, >0 to query a proposal, =0 to query executed state

returns.executedAt: When owners allocation completed, =0 if not complete
returns.uploadedAt: When owners upload completed, =0 if not complete

params.pid: Proposal ID, identifies an existing proposal

getSeqNum(address).details: Get next expected seq num for the given account address

returns.seqNumEx: Next expected seq num to be passed to a write function call from `account`

initialize(address,bytes16).details: Basically replaces the constructor in a proxy oriented contract - `initializer` modifier ensures this function can only be called once during deploy - See UUPS_UPGRADE_SEQ for details on how to upgrade this contract

params.creator: Creator's address for access control during setup
params.reqId: Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers

preUpgrade(uint40,bytes16,bytes16).details: Stage values to use in the next call to `__authorizeUpgrade`

params.reqId: Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers
params.seqNumEx: =0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`

propAddOwners(uint40,bytes16,(uint256,ui.details: Idempotency is provided via correct client processing of function i/o - Naming uses a metaphor where each upload has a page of lines (OwnInfo[]) added to a book of lines - CallRes: Indicates progress where `rc` is set from `AddOwnRc`

params.req: See struct definition - reduces stack pressure
params.reqId: Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers
params.seqNumEx: =0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`

propCreate(uint256,bytes16,address,bool).details: Add an instrument revenue proposal, this creates a stub that must be populated by additional calls - Inputs validated upstream - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain

params.correction: Whether the proposal is a correction

propExecute(uint256).details: Execute an instrument revenue proposal as gas allows, progress given by return code - This function should be called until `code=ExecRevRc.Done`, work is unlikely to complete in a single tx - Idempotency is provided by an private cursor. Excess calls are safe and only waste gas. - All values in the proposal validated upstream: before on-chain, during upload/creation, and during approval - Instruments processing is sequential. Consider `pruneProposal` in the unlikely event of blocked progress. - See REV_MGR_PROP_EXEC_BIG_O for pros/cons on this algo being O(N^2) vs O(N) - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain

returns.result: Indicates progress where `rc` is set from `ExecRevRc` - Progress: Partial progress - Done    : Proposal is complete - NoProp  : No proposal found by pid - PartProp: Partial proposal found, not fully uploaded - PropStat: Proposal status not fit for execution - LowFunds: An event should provide more context, such as: LowFunds, LowAllowance, XferErr - NoOwners: No owners found for instrument revenue - NoInstRev: Should not happen, would indicate a corrupt interaction with the InstRevMgr

propFinalize(uint256).details: Reviews progress of `propAddInstRev` and `propAddOwners` and marks request as fully uploaded - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain

returns.rc: Indicates progress: - Ok        : Proposal upload complete - NoProp    : No proposal found by pid - DiffLens  : Different count of instrument revenues and owner snapshots - NoInstRev : No instrument revenue in proposal - PartOwners: Owners are only partially uploaded

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

pruneProp(uint256,string,uint256).details: Remove an instrument earn date (InstRev + OwnSnap) from a sealed proposal - This is an escape hatch to help ensure progress in `propExecute` - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain

returns.rc: Indicates progress: - Done     : Proposal is complete - NoProp   : No proposal found by pid - PropStat : Proposal is not fully uploaded, create a new proposal - NoInst   : Not found in proposal by key - LastInst : Pruning the last instrument would invalidate the proposal - MidBal   : Proposal is in the middle of balance increases, see `rc` below (Should not happen) - LastInst : Pruning the last instrument would invalidate the proposal

params.reqId: Request ID, unique amongst requests across all callers
params.seqNumEx: =0 for on-chain caller, else expected sequence number for determinism, etc; See `CallTracker`

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

getPropHdr(uint256).notice: Get instrument revenue proposal header info. - To get `InstRev` in the prop, see `getInstRevs` - To get `OwnInfo` in the prop, see `getOwnInfo`

propAddOwners(uint40,bytes16,(uint256,ui.notice: Add to the ownership snapshot for an instrument earn date - Must occur after `propAddInstRev` since it stores revenue per owner in each OwnInfo to simplify the model   and that requires InstRev for validation

documentation.text:
@dev Execute an instrument revenue proposal as gas allows, progress given by return code
 - This function should be called until `code=ExecRevRc.Done`, work is unlikely to complete in a single tx
 - Idempotency is provided by an private cursor. Excess calls are safe and only waste gas.
 - All values in the proposal validated upstream: before on-chain, during upload/creation, and during approval
 - Instruments processing is sequential. Consider `pruneProposal` in the unlikely event of blocked progress.
 - See REV_MGR_PROP_EXEC_BIG_O for pros/cons on this algo being O(N^2) vs O(N)
 - No `_isReqReplay` since this call cannot be executed directly from off-chain
 @param pid Proposal ID
 @return result Indicates progress where `rc` is set from `ExecRevRc`
 - Progress: Partial progress
 - Done    : Proposal is complete
 - NoProp  : No proposal found by pid
 - PartProp: Partial proposal found, not fully uploaded
 - PropStat: Proposal status not fit for execution
 - LowFunds: An event should provide more context, such as: LowFunds, LowAllowance, XferErr
 - NoOwners: No owners found for instrument revenue
 - NoInstRev: Should not happen, would indicate a corrupt interaction with the InstRevMgr
 @custom:api private
